LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS HEALTH NET, INC, HEALTH NET OF CALIFORNIA, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620 ---------------------------------------- AFTER HEARING THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AS TO PLAINTIFF ENDERSON IS DENIED. THE ARBITRATION CLAUSE IN LIM'S (ENDERSON'S WIFE) APPLICATION VIOLATES THE KNOX-KEENE ACT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AS TO PLAINTIFF PROBST IS GRANTED. THE ARBITRATION CLAUSE IN NOT UNCONSCIONABLE. PARTIES NOTIFIED OF THE COURT'S RULING BY TELEPHONE. DEFENDANTS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.

Off Calendar Aug-16-2011 Continued To Sep-02-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

Defendants Health Net, Inc, Health Net Of California, Inc'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS HEALTH NET, INC, HEALTH NET OF CALIFORNIA, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS.
Appearances: Rosemary M. Rivas and Mark Punzalan of Finkelstein Thompson LLP (398.8700) for plaintiffs and responding parties; Ethan P. Schulman and Steven E. Wilson of Crowell Moring (986.2800) for defendants and moving parties.
Argued and the court took the matter under submission. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
---
After hearing the court ruled as follows: Defendant's motion to compel arbitration as to plaintiff Enderson is denied. The arbitration clause in Lim's (Enderson's wife) application violates the Knox-Keene Act. Defendant's motion to compel arbitration as to plaintiff Probst is granted. The arbitration clause in not unconscionable. Parties notified of the court's ruling by telephone. Defendants to submit a proposed form of order.

Defendant Health Net, Inc., Health Net Of California, Inc. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. DEFENDANTS HEALTH NET, INC, HEALTH NET OF CALIFORNIA, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS is continued to August 19, 2011 on agreement of the parties. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS HEALTH NET, INC, HEALTH NET OF CALIFORNIA, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to August 12, 2011. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceedings, Or In The Alternative, To Temporarily Stay Discovery To Allow Coordination With Related Federal Actions; Appenidx
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS HEALTH NET, INC, HEALTH NET OF CALIFORNIA, INC'S MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TO TEMPORARILY STAY DISCOVERY TO ALLOW COORDINATION WITH RELATED FEDERAL ACTIONS. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendants' request for a stay of discovery is granted. Discovery in this matter is stayed for 60 days for the parties to coordinate discovery process with the Federal Actions. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
